cases.pregame_reason: NYK price too short; EV failed; CLE away-underdog filter not met
cases.reason: Halftime check: CLE leads NYK 48-46. This is a close game and CLE has partly proved the live-watch case (Mitchell efficient, Mobley active, NYK cold from three), but live moneyline/spread prices were not available from accessible sources. Because the plan requires both live structure and live price confirmation, this remains a no-bet SKIP.

live_watch_plan.default: Pregame SKIP. Q1 observe only. Halftime reassess. Most likely outcome remains no bet.
live_watch_plan.discipline_rule: Do not bet NYK just because they are likely to win; do not bet CLE just because the odds look attractive. Only act if live odds and live structure both improve.

required_structure: Brunson and NYK offense look controlled
Cleveland is not dominating the glass
any NYK dip looks normal, not structural
nyk_live_interest.possible_action: small live ML or protected spread only if price improves because of a normal in-game dip
nyk_live_interest.auto_skip: skip if NYK trails because Cleveland is clearly better structurally

cle_live_interest.pregame_profile: CLE away-underdog value profile not strong enough at 3.15 with about 31% away probability
required_structure: game is close or CLE leads at halftime
Mitchell is efficient and not forcing
CLE still offers decent odds or protected spread
cle_live_interest.possible_action: small protected-spread consideration only if live structure proves the case

halftime_context.structure_read: Close score, CLE efficient from three, NYK very cold from three; no live price confirmation available.
